author: Samuel Vaillant
subject: test(createConnector): use consistent test strategies (algolia/react-instantsearch#1858)
body:
* style(createConnector): re-order methods

* refactor(createConnector): drop useless cleanUp method

* test(createConnector): use consistent tests strategies for state management

* test(createConnector): use consistent tests strategies for widget management

* test(createConnector): use consistent tests strategies for createURL, refine, searchForFacetValues

* test(createConnector): use {} rather than null for providedProps

* test(createConnector): cover getSearchParameters

* test(createConnector): cover getMetadata

* test(createConnector): cover transitionState
